error.diff_off_greater_than_diff_low: Stop difference (Diff_off) must be less than or equal to Low-power difference (Diff_low).
error.diff_on_less_than_diff_off: Turn-on difference (Diff_on) must be greater than or equal to Turn-off difference (Diff_off).

user.title: My AC Controller
user.description:
Configure your AC controller.

This integration uses an external temperature sensor to accurately control your air conditioner, compensating for inaccuracies in the AC's built-in sensor.

bp_settings.title: Inverter Mode Settings
bp_settings.description:
Configure inverter (variable-frequency) AC thresholds.

**Stop difference (Diff_off):** When the absolute temperature difference is within this value, the AC will be turned off to prevent overshooting.

**Low-power difference (Diff_low):** When the absolute temperature difference is within this value (but above Diff_off), the AC will run in low-power mode for gentle adjustment.

**Step:** Temperature step for rounding the AC target in low-power mode.

**Round direction:** How to round the AC target temperature step.

dp_settings.title: Fixed-Speed Mode Settings
dp_settings.description:
Configure fixed-speed (on/off) AC thresholds.

**Turn-on difference (Diff_on):** When the absolute temperature difference reaches or exceeds this value, the AC will turn on.

**Turn-off difference (Diff_off):** When the absolute temperature difference drops to or below this value, the AC will turn off.

Diff_on should be greater than Diff_off to create a hysteresis band and prevent short cycling.

common.title: Common Settings
common.description: Configure general settings for the controller.

error.diff_off_greater_than_diff_low: Stop difference (Diff_off) must be less than or equal to Low-power difference (Diff_low).
error.diff_on_less_than_diff_off: Turn-on difference (Diff_on) must be greater than or equal to Turn-off difference (Diff_off).

init.title: My AC Controller Options
init.description: What settings would you like to adjust?

mode_settings.title: Mode Thresholds
mode_settings.description: Adjust the temperature thresholds for your AC control mode.
